overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates through urban canyons, elevated highways, and tunnels during golden hour, weaving between futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass transitioning to neon-lit commercial street

events.description: exits covered concrete underpass into open city street with visible sky
accelerates onto wider avenue while navigating between slower vehicles

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle with stickers through urban streets, navigating between futuristic vehicles under concrete overpasses

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead in the same lane
blue truck passing on the left side

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge with metal supports spanning the road overhead
tall digital screens displaying colorful cyberpunk advertisements and brand logos
tall glass and steel buildings lining both sides of the street creating an urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with neon-lit surroundings. The rider emerges from the sheltered underpass into a wider city street lined with futuristic skyscrapers and digital billboards. The motorcycle accelerates while navigating between a sedan ahead and a blue truck passing on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with palm tree median and bridge views

events.description: emerges from building shadows into direct golden hour sunlight, casting long shadows on the road
transitions from ground level street to elevated highway ramp with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway, overtaking slower vehicles while palm trees line the center median

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving parallel on the right side

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center median of the multi-lane highway
distant bridge structure visible on the horizon against the golden sky
curved overpass ramp with yellow safety barriers connecting to higher levels

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from the urban canyon into a wide-open highway bathed in golden hour sunlight. Palm trees line the median while distant bridge towers frame the horizon. The rider accelerates on the elevated ramp, leaving the neon-lit underpass behind as the environment opens up to reveal the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop level elevated roadway with concrete barriers and tight turns

events.description: enters elevated rooftop section with tight chicane turns marked by concrete barriers
executes sharp right turn navigating around red and white striped concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns on elevated rooftop roadway, maneuvering around concrete barriers while overlooking the city

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete blocks forming a chicane pattern on the road
HVAC units and mechanical structures visible on building rooftops beside the road
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows catching the golden sunset light

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a rooftop-level highway with tight turns marked by red and white concrete barriers. The rider navigates the chicane while industrial equipment and glass office towers flank the elevated roadway. The golden sunlight reflects off the modern architecture as the motorcycle descends from the open highway into a more constrained path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with neon signage and heavy traffic congestion

events.description: descends from rooftop level back into dense urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides
navigates through heavy traffic congestion, weaving between multiple lanes of vehicles

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense traffic in narrow urban canyon, surrounded by towering buildings and bright neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: green sports car directly ahead braking suddenly in traffic
silver sedan merging into lane from the right side

entered.detail: massive red digital display showing '54' and animated advertisements on building facade
glowing green cross symbol mounted on building indicating medical facility
enclosed glass walkway connecting two skyscrapers above the road

segments.scene_description: Descending from the rooftop highway, the motorcycle enters a dense urban canyon with heavy traffic. A massive red '54' billboard dominates the left side while a glowing green medical cross marks the right. The rider weaves through congested traffic, passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed by towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed highway tunnel with holographic ceiling displays

events.description: enters darker tunnel section illuminated by cyan and blue holographic ceiling panels
accelerates to high speed while overtaking multiple vehicles in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: speeding through neon-lit tunnel sections, overtaking vehicles on both sides with high velocity

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: glowing blue and cyan light panels covering the tunnel ceiling creating a digital canopy
large building sign with 'EL PADRE' text visible on the left side of the highway
elevated train tracks running parallel to the highway above the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment features high-speed driving through a tunnel with a mesmerizing holographic ceiling of blue and cyan lights. The motorcycle overtakes a yellow taxi and other vehicles while passing the 'El Padre' building sign. Overhead monorail tracks run parallel to the road as the rider maintains high velocity through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from a neon-lit urban underpass into a sun-drenched highway before descending back into a dense, holographic city corridor. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, accelerating past digital billboards and futuristic vehicles as the rider emerges into a wide city street. As the urban canyon opens up, the scene shifts to an elevated highway bathed in golden hour sunlight, where palm trees and distant bridge towers frame a sprawling skyline. The camera then navigates a series of tight turns along a rooftop-level roadway flanked by glass towers, before descending back into a congested urban canyon dominated by a massive red billboard and a glowing medical cross. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the motorcycle plunges into a tunnel featuring a mesmerizing blue holographic ceiling and parallel monorail tracks.
